texto: It’s estimated that $55 million dollars is spent on aftercare in Kenya alone every year. This model is not practical or sustainable and does nothing to address the growing epidemic of sexual violence. It’s crucial to get the world community to recognize self-defense as a viable means to prevention and begin a dialogue about how every single young or old woman can learn these simple life-saving techniques.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Cole sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “It’s estimated that $55 million dollars is spent on aftercare in Kenya alone every year. This mod…” articula sabedoria, abuse, rape em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como rape e rape-culture.
